description:
A music player that respects what's yours.

Noctis is a desktop music player for your local library — fast browsing,
synced lyrics, metadata editing, EQ, and more.
What's Changed
- Fixed updater incorrectly skipping valid Windows installer releases
- Fixed pre-release version tags not being detected correctly
- Fixed threading race condition in the artist album index
- Fixed stale storage size values after library scans
- Improved library safety by preventing internal album list mutations
- Added optional pre-release update support in Settings
- Added Include pre-release updates toggle to the Settings About section
Full Changelog: v1.1.10...v1.1.11
